stemHtml: An aircraft is flying RNAV 2 and another aircraft is flying RNP 2. What is the difference between them?

options.a: RNP 2 is used in the en-route and oceanic/remote phases of flight. RNAV 2 might be used in the en-route continental, arrival and departure phases of flight.
options.b: RNP 2 is used on arrival and departure phases of flight. RNAV 2 is used in the en-route and oceanic/remote phases of flight.
options.c: RNP 2 is used in the en-route and oceanic/remote phases of flight. RNAV 2 is used in oceanic phases of flights or over remote areas
options.d: RNP 2 might be used in the en-route continental, arrival and departure phases of flight. RNAV 2 is used in the en-route and oceanic/remote phases of flight
